ticket.title: Deploy the DynamoDB session table + wire env vars
ticket.description: Deploy the CDK DataStack to create app-sessions-{env} (PK sessionId, TTL, PAY_PER_REQUEST), set the session-table env vars, and grant the runtime role the session-table IAM actions - the deploy half of the session work.

code_agent.rationale: code_agent keeps the in-scope codebase/decision context; release/workspace is out of scope, local notes are private, the staging note has expired; 'Credit system terms', 'Cognito acceptance ' are in scope but tangential here (optional).

qa_agent.rationale: qa_agent keeps the in-scope codebase/decision context; project/workspace is out of scope, local notes are private, the staging note has expired; 'Shipped a linked ticket (Cognito)', 'Cognito acceptance ' are in scope but tangential here (optional).

design_agent.rationale: design_agent keeps the in-scope ticket context; codebase/release is out of scope, local notes are private, the staging note has expired; 'Decision: the web app never imports the AWS SDK', 'CONVENTIONS.md — input revalidation (Convention 9)', 'Credit system terms' are in scope but tangential here (optional).

product_agent.rationale: product_agent keeps the in-scope release/ticket context; codebase is out of scope, local notes are private, the staging note has expired; 'CONVENTIONS.md — input revalidation (Convention 9)', 'Decision: the web app never imports the AWS SDK', 'Credit system terms' are in scope but tangential here (optional).

human_teammate.rationale: Robin (the baseline owner) sees the current team entries; another actor's local note stays on its owner's device, the expired staging note is dropped.
